S.FORM: = Daniel Ortega = Mntucing hngkawas 1946 idas 11 jiyax 11 ka Daniel Ortega ga, empklaw ka hiya. Bukung klwaan Nicaragua ta sayang o kiya ka Daniel Ortega, pnaah hngkawas 2007 idas 1 jiyax 10 pnrajing kmlawa klwaan. Papak
S.PHON: = daniəl oɾtəga = mntuʦiŋ ħŋkawas **** idas ** ɟijax ** ka daniəl oɾtəga ga, əmpklaw ka ħija. bukuŋ klwaan niʦaɾagua ta sajaŋ o kija ka daniəl oɾtəga, pnaaħ ħŋkawas **** idas * ɟijax ** pnɾaɟiŋ kmlawa klwaan. papak
S.FORM: = Daniel Ortega = Mntucing hngkawas 1946 idas 11 jiyax 11 ka Daniel Ortega ga, empklaw ka hiya. Bukung klwaan Nicaragua ta sayang o kiya ka Daniel Ortega, pnaah hngkawas 2007 idas 1 jiyax 10 pnrajing kmlawa klwaan. Papak
S.PHON: = daniəl oɾtəga = mntuʦiŋ ħŋkawas **** idas ** ɟijax ** ka daniəl oɾtəga ga, əmpklaw ka ħija. bukuŋ klwaan niʦaɾagua ta sajaŋ o kija ka daniəl oɾtəga, pnaaħ ħŋkawas **** idas * ɟijax ** pnɾaɟiŋ kmlawa klwaan. papak
